## PR 2: Artifact Registry + Shallow Story Layer Schemas

### Scope

Implements the runtime registry and JSON Schema files required by `STORY_LAYER_CONTRACT_V1.md` (#628). Shallow typing only — each of the 8 story layers remains `{ "type": "object" }` for this PR. Detailed per-layer typing is deferred.

No processor behavior changes. No UI. No stage-machine wiring.

### Files added

- `lib/evaluation/artifacts/artifactTypes.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/artifacts/artifactRegistry.ts`
- `schemas/evaluation/pass1a_story_layer_v1.schema.json`
- `schemas/evaluation/ledger_user_feedback_v1.schema.json`
- `schemas/evaluation/accepted_story_ledger_v1.schema.json`
- `schemas/evaluation/story_shape_signal_map_v1.schema.json`
- `schemas/evaluation/manuscript_signal_appendix_v1.schema.json`
- `__tests__/evaluation/artifactRegistry.coverage.test.ts`
- `__tests__/evaluation/schemas.envelope.test.ts`

### Contract enforced

- Registry includes the canonical artifact set from the Story Layer and supporting-signal contracts.
- `accepted_story_ledger_v1` is the only Phase 2 story-understanding authority.
- `ledger_user_feedback_v1` is required and non-nullable.
- `pass1a_story_layer_v1` remains exactly 8 layers.
- `story_shape_signal_map_v1` and `manuscript_signal_appendix_v1` are support artifacts only.
- Support artifacts carry accepted-ledger dependency and staleness fields.

### Tests added

- Registry coverage test: every canonical artifact type resolves to a registry entry.
- Schema path test: every schema-backed registry entry points to an existing schema.
- Phase 2 authority test: only `accepted_story_ledger_v1` is marked as Phase 2 story authority.
- Support artifact test: support artifacts are enrichment only and never story-layer creators.
- Schema envelope test: every schema requires the runtime artifact envelope.
- Schema const test: every schema pins `artifact_type` to its artifact name.
- Contract tests for eight-layer Story Layer shape, accepted ledger dependencies, and support artifact staleness fields.

### Out of scope

- Stage machine / hard-stop wiring (PR 3)
- Phase 1A writers (PR 4)
- Approval writer (PR 5)
- Support artifact writers (PR 6)
- UI shell (PR 7)
- Any processor or runtime behavior change
- SQL migrations
- Route, worker, cron, prompt, or UI changes

### Reviewer note

This PR must remain shape-only. Reject any commit that modifies pipeline behavior or imports runtime pipeline modules.
